---
title: "Ethan Whitehead" 
about: 
  template: trestles  # jolla  trestles  solana  marquee  broadside
  image: img/profile.png
  image-width: 16em
  image-shape: rounded # rectangle  round  rounded
  
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn 
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/ethanwhitehead/
    - icon: instagram
      text: Instagram
      href: https://instagram.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/Ethan-W-Geneseo 
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: Resumé
      href: resume-example.pdf
      target: _blank
    - icon: mailbox
      text: Email
      href: mailto:ejw100@geneseo.edu

---


Ethan Whitehead is enrolled in a B.S. in Finance and a B.A. in Economics at SUNY Geneseo.

## Education

State University of New York at Geneseo | Geneseo, NY <br>
B.S. in Finance, B.A. in Economics | Aug 2021 - May 2025 <br>

## Experience

Utica National Insurance Group | Enterprise Transformation Intern | May 2024 - Aug 2024
